global.summary: A demonstration of the Three.js 3D walkthrough viewer using the classic Sponza atrium test scene.

sponza.title: Sponza Atrium
sponza.description: Classic architecture test scene with arches, columns, and an open courtyard.
facts: The Sponza model is a standard benchmark scene in 3D graphics.
Originally based on the Sponza Palace in Dubrovnik, Croatia.

faqs.q: What can I see in Sponza Atrium?
faqs.a: Classic Sponza architecture test scene — open atrium with arches and columns.
3D Walkthrough Demo is an interactive virtual tour. Use navigation markers to move between scenes.

suggestedQuestions: What is available at 3D Walkthrough Demo?
